# B-TEXTMAN

> B-TEXTMAN is a cloud SMS gateway that turns Android phones with real SIM cards into a programmable REST API with realtime delivery reports.

B-TEXTMAN lets developers and businesses send SMS messages through Android devices they own, instead of paying per-message rates from cloud SMS providers. Features include multi-device routing, API-key authentication, live analytics, Unicode and multipart support, webhook delivery reports, and reliable retry logic.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and getting-started links.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a B-TEXTMAN account.
